Quick check: Who were the first five teenage X-Men?

The spectacular original five were Angel, Beast, Cyclops, Iceman, and Jean Grey! Together with their grand mentor Professor X, they launched a marvelous legacy of mutant heroics in 1963. They were the legendary first class of marvelous students!

Explain the pulse-pounding plot of Days of Future Past!

In a dark, spectacular future, mutant-hunting Sentinels have conquered the world, forcing a desperate race through time! Kitty Pryde sends her marvelous mind back into the past to prevent a catastrophic assassination and save mutantkind from a grand mechanical doom. It is a legendary struggle for survival across two spectacular timelines!

Tell me about the marvelous birth of the X-Men!

Prepare to be dazzled by mutant history! In September 1963, the legendary Stan Lee and Jack Kirby unleashed the X-Men in their spectacular first issue, introducing a grand team of teenagers protecting a world that fears them. It was a marvelous genesis that forever changed the face of the Marvel Universe!

Quiz: Where is the Xavier Institute located?

The spectacular Xavier Institute is famously situated in Westchester County, New York! Specifically, it is located at 1407 Graymalkin Lane in the town of Salem Center. This grand estate serves as both a school for gifted youngsters and the secret headquarters of the X-Men!

Why are the Sentinels such a terrifying mechanical threat?

These towering mechanical terrors were created by Bolivar Trask to hunt down and eliminate anyone with the marvelous X-Gene! Driven by human fear and prejudice, Sentinels represent the ultimate technological challenge to mutant survival. Their cold, spectacular precision has fueled many of the most legendary and tragic stories in mutant history!
